services.label: What We Do
services.headline: Your Complete Backyard<br class="hidden md:block"> Wellness Destination
services.subtitle: From crystal-clear pools to soothing hot tubs and invigorating cold plunges, Lake Air Pool Supply is your one-stop shop for everything outdoor living in Central Texas.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance & Service
cards.description: Expert weekly and seasonal pool maintenance with free computerized water testing, chemical balancing, and custom care plans tailored to your pool.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Replacement
cards.description: Professional repair and replacement of filters, pumps, motors, heaters, and cleaners backed by our team's 150+ years of combined hands-on experience.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: As an authorized Hot Spring dealer, we offer the world's #1 selling hot tub brand with test soaks, backyard consultations, delivery, and ongoing service.

cards.title: Swim Spas
cards.description: Endless Pools swim spa sales and installation for year-round swimming, exercise, and relaxation right in your own Central Texas backyard.

cards.title: Saunas & Cold Plunges
cards.description: Premium saunas and cold plunge units to complete your backyard wellness retreat with therapeutic hot and cold therapy options.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Supplies
cards.description: Full retail store stocking BioGuard water care products, Aqua Finesse, pool chemicals, accessories, and everything you need for pool and spa maintenance.

steps.title: Bring In a Water Sample
steps.description: Stop by our Waco showroom with a water sample from your pool or spa. Our free computerized water testing gives you an exact analysis in minutes.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Care Plan
steps.description: Our experts create a personalized treatment plan with the exact products and steps to keep your water pristine. No guesswork, no unnecessary chemicals.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal-Clear Water
steps.description: Follow your custom plan or let our experienced service team handle everything. Either way, you get sparkling water and more time to relax and enjoy your backyard.

about.label: Why Waco Trusts Us
about.headline: Three Generations Strong — Serving Central Texas Since 1959
about.description: Lake Air Pool Supply is a family-owned business now in its third generation of ownership. For over 65 years, we've been a fixture on Franklin Ave in Waco, setting the standard for pool and spa excellence. Our team brings more than 150 years of combined experience to every water test, equipment repair, and hot tub consultation. We're not just a pool store — we're your neighbors, committed to this community through local charitable efforts and the same friendly service that's earned us a 4.9-star reputation.

features.title: 150+ Years Combined Experience
features.description: Our technicians bring generations of hands-on knowledge to every service call. There isn't a pool problem we haven't seen and solved.

features.title: One-Stop Backyard Shop
features.description: Pools, hot tubs, swim spas, saunas, cold plunges, grills, and all the supplies to maintain them — all under one roof on Franklin Ave.

features.title: Community First, Always
features.description: We actively participate in local initiatives and charitable efforts because Waco isn't just where we work — it's home, and it has been for 67 years.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing from a Family You Can Trust
pricing.subtitle: Whether you need a $5 water test kit or a $15,000 swim spa, you'll get straightforward pricing with no gimmicks. Stop by our showroom or call for a free consultation.

guarantee.headline: Our "Three-Generation" Service Guarantee
guarantee.description: We didn't build a 67-year reputation by cutting corners. If you're not completely satisfied with any product or service we provide, we'll make it right — period. Our family name is on every interaction, and three generations of trust mean we stand behind everything we sell and every service call we make.

faqs.question: How often should I have my pool water tested?
faqs.answer: We recommend bringing in a water sample at least once a month for our free computerized analysis. During peak summer months in Central Texas, every two weeks is ideal. Our system tests for over a dozen parameters and generates a custom treatment plan so you know exactly what your pool needs.

faqs.question: What brands of hot tubs do you carry?
faqs.answer: We're an authorized Hot Spring Spas dealer — the world's #1 selling hot tub brand. We also carry Endless Pools swim spas. Visit our showroom on Franklin Ave in Waco to browse models, and we encourage you to schedule a test soak before you buy.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool equipment repair or just sales?
faqs.answer: Both. Our service team has over 150 years of combined experience repairing and replacing filters, pumps, motors, heaters, and pool cleaners. We diagnose the issue, explain your options, and get your equipment running right — often the same week you call.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Central Texas?
faqs.answer: We serve Waco, Robinson, China Spring, McGregor, Lorena, Riesel, Temple, Belton, Gatesville, and surrounding Central Texas communities. If you're within driving distance of our Franklin Ave location, give us a call.

faqs.question: Can I schedule regular pool maintenance service?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer weekly and seasonal maintenance plans that include chemical balancing, equipment checks, and water testing. Many Waco families have trusted us with their weekly pool care for years — some for decades. Call us to set up a plan that fits your needs and budget.

testimonials.name: Brian K.
testimonials.text: Great company, and Brian and the team were excellent at what they do. Highly recommend them for your first hot tub and continued excellent help for any questions or issues.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Their service is great and the employees are helpful and knowledgeable. The installation and instructions were amazing with exceptional responses to questions after sale.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: Excellent service and experience of the people who work there. Highly recommend this business for pool and spa needs in the Waco area.
